---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for MedSBOM
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. Ex. "I need to generate IEC 80001 reports but..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Regulatory context (if applicable)**
Which regulation or standard does this relate to? (FDA guidance, IEC 62304, ISO 14971, etc.)

**Additional context**
Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
